description: Read-only reviewer posture. Find-don't-fix is guard-enforced: any write outside the findings destination fires the guard. The reviewer sees the whole work tree but cannot change it.
notes: The reviewer's only writable surface is the findings artifact inside the dispatch's evidence directory. Exhaust, registry, settings, and the governor surface are all blocked. Network beyond the model API is a binding-level concern (CC restricts subagent network by default).
